note: Data-driven KOICA PDM self-check. C-rules are Critical (hard gate in GATE mode). A-rules are Advisory (numeric threshold). Structural rules (C01-C05, C08) are enforced deterministically by validate-critical.sh; C06 and A-rules are LLM-judged. The same checklist scores the benchmark in AUDIT mode. See rules/koica-rules.md for guideline citations. C07 (single-outcome) was removed 2026-06-05 — see koica-rules.md §10. Baseline/target are deferred ('추후 확정') by default since 2026-06-10 — A05 is N/A while a target is deferred (koica-rules.md §4.8, §10).

critical.description: Impact row must have NO indicators or MoV
critical.check: impact.indicators is empty AND impact.mov is empty

critical.description: Each outcome must have 1-2 indicators (hard cap 3)
Every output/outcome indicator must have a non-empty MoV
critical.check: for each indicator in outputs+outcomes: indicator.mov is non-empty
critical.source: guideline p.18 (per-indicator, stricter than per-level; reviewer 2026-05-28)

critical.description: Every output must be referenced by at least one outcome's from_outputs
critical.check: for each output.id: exists in some outcome.from_outputs

critical.description: Output narrative must be noun-form, not a restatement of an activity
critical.check: LLM judge: is output.narrative a noun-form deliverable (goods/services), not an activity verb?

critical.description: Every activity must be referenced by at least one output's from_activities (even support activities must connect to an output)
critical.check: for each activity.id (or one of its sub ids): exists in some output.from_activities

advisory.description: Each indicator should satisfy SMART criteria
advisory.check: LLM judge: Specific, Measurable, Attainable, Relevant, Timely?
advisory.unit: per-indicator (rule passes if >50% of indicators satisfy)

advisory.description: Each indicator should satisfy CREAM criteria
advisory.check: LLM judge: Clear, Relevant, Economic, Adequate, Monitorable?
advisory.unit: per-indicator (rule passes if >50% of indicators satisfy)

advisory.description: At least one indicator should have gender disaggregation (mandatory per guideline)
advisory.check: exists indicator where disaggregation contains 'gender' or '성별'

advisory.description: Proxy indicators must have explicit justification with assumption
advisory.check: for each indicator where is_proxy=true: proxy_justification is non-empty

advisory.description: Target should be realistic relative to baseline (baseline + expected improvement)
advisory.check: LLM judge: given baseline, duration, and context, is the target realistic? CONDITIONAL: if baseline or target is deferred ('추후 확정'/null/empty), this rule is N/A and counts as pass (baseline/target are set post-finalization from field survey — koica-rules.md §4.8).

advisory.description: Indicator should be measurable at end-of-project evaluation
advisory.check: LLM judge: can this indicator be measured within 1 year after project completion?

advisory.description: Output should not be a restatement or recombination of activities
advisory.check: LLM judge: is the output a result distinct from its linked activities (process)?

advisory.description: Outcome should describe behavioral change, not just an output at scale
advisory.check: LLM judge: does the outcome describe a change in behavior/practice in the target group?
